schedule.type: Story 2 — Knicks KAT extension + Dolan second apron
Story 3 — Giannis + Bam Heat era begins

stories.title: Austin Reaves Signs Historic $185M Max Deal with Lakers

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Austin Reaves just made NBA history. 💜💛

4 years. $185 million. Lakers.

Richest contract EVER for an undrafted player.

He was on a golf course when the deal closed. Fell in the grass.

From undrafted (2021) to $185M man. That's a story. 🏀

#HoopHeroes #Lakers #AustinReaves

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
The Nets offered Reaves $178.5M.
The Pistons were planning a "real run" at him.

Lakers said: here's $185M. Stay.

He stayed.

"My heart's been in LA every morning I woke up."

That's loyalty AND math. ✅

#HoopHeroes #Lakers #NBAFreeAgency

stories.title: Knicks Offseason — KAT Extension Talks Begin, Dolan's Second Apron Wall

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
KAT is eligible for a $272M extension.

He said he'd take $100M LESS to keep the Knicks together.

Dolan said the second apron is "suicidal."

Brunson took $113M less. Won the title. Won Finals MVP.

Now it's KAT's turn to do the same. 🤔

#HoopHeroes #Knicks #KarlAnthonyTowns

article.headline: KAT's $272M Decision and Dolan's Hard Line: The Knicks' Championship Is Already Under Threat

stories.title: Giannis + Bam in Miami — Heat's New Era Begins July 6

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
July 6. That's when it becomes real.

Giannis Antetokounmpo officially becomes a Miami Heat.

Giannis + Bam Adebayo.

Two of the best two-way forwards on the same roster.

Defending champion Knicks, are you watching? 👀

#HoopHeroes #HeatNation #NBAOffseason

stories.title: Michigan's Historic Draft Night — Three Top-12 Picks, The 2026 Draft Aftermath

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Michigan just made NBA Draft history.

No. 9 — Morez Johnson Jr. → Dallas
No. 11 — Yaxel Lendeborg → Golden State
No. 12 — Aday Mara → OKC

3 Wolverines. Top 12. Never done before.

NCAA champs. Draft champs. 🐺

#HoopHeroes #NBADraft2026 #Michigan

stories.title: LaMelo Ball Trade Market Opens — Wolves and Raptors Circle Charlotte

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
LaMelo Ball is on the market.

Teams calling Charlotte:
• Minnesota (Edwards + LaMelo?)
• Toronto (Barnes + Ingram + Ball?)
• Milwaukee (post-Giannis rebuild)

24 years old. $40.8M.

Trade window opens July 6. 🏀

#HoopHeroes #LaMeloBall #NBATradeRumors
